value.found_quote: Role-based access control (RBAC) lets you decide who can do what across your organization and projects—both through the API and in the Dashboard.
value.rationale: The page clearly describes OpenAI's RBAC offering, confirming that administrators can control who can perform what actions across the organization and projects. The page also lists network-level access controls such as "IP allowlist" (View and manage IP allowlist) and "mTLS" (View and manage mutual TLS settings) as RBAC-governed permissions, supporting the claim's mention of network-level access controls. The offering is presented as currently active with no deprecation or preview notices.
